description: Accounts in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals. On recto there are at least six items, divided into subsections. Mentions 13 qintars of something; a ḥammāl or jammāl; and more. Needs further examination. (Information in part from Goitein's index card)
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Greek/Coptic Numerals. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
